title: Comprehensive mapping of Neurofibromin 1 (NF1) expression in developing mouse brain
abstract: High-resolution spatiotemporal map of NF1 expression in developing mouse brain. Using ISH and IHC from early embryonic stages through postnatal maturation. Integrated with snRNA-seq from adult mouse brain. Reveals previously undocumented graded expression pattern across brain regions and cell lineages. Framework for studying NF1-associated brain disorders.
